Title: Prepare v0.1.0-alpha.1 pre-release notes
Description: Honest alpha notes exist in docs/release-notes/v0.1.0-alpha.1.md: Windows mixer fallback works, BrowserGain depends on site/browser support, ObserveOnly sources are visible but not directly controlled.

Title: Validate YouTube tabCapture-first behavior
Description: Retest YouTube after tabCapture-first. Expected primary path on Chromium: tab-capture, BrowserGain if signal is usable, or honest ObserveOnly/fallback Windows if capture is no-signal/restricted/unsupported.

Title: Validate TikTok tabCapture-first fallback behavior
Description: Retest TikTok after tabCapture-first. Expected non-direct case remains honest tab-capture no-signal with fallbackRecommended=true and desktop WindowsSessionVolume fallback.

Title: Validate Spotify Web tabCapture-first behavior
Description: Retest Spotify Web after tabCapture-first. Expected primary path on Chromium: tab-capture, with media-html only as secondary fallback if tab capture cannot start.

Title: Show browser recovery reason and action
Description: browser_source_observed carries captureSignalState and the desktop shows Raison/Action guidance for ObserveOnly, Unknown, skipped or no-signal sources.

Title: Prefer Chromium tabCapture for protected browser tabs
Description: Protected tabs now try tabCapture first on Chromium, keep media-html as a secondary fallback, and expose needs-user-action, restricted or unsupported states when direct capture is not available.

Title: Add read-only Global Output Monitor
Description: Desktop now observes the default Windows output device with loopback RMS/peak/state metrics, shows Sortie globale, logs global_output.* locally, and never changes Windows master volume or writes raw audio.

Title: Add Coverage Dashboard
Description: Desktop now summarizes source coverage as Direct, Fallback Windows, Action requise, Limite, or Inconnu, adds per-source coverage actions, logs coverage.*, and includes coverage in copied readable reports.

Title: Detect unknown active global output
Description: Desktop now logs global_output.unknown_active when loopback output is active but no known Windows/browser source explains it, then logs resolved when the signal is explained again.

Title: Add Stream Safe and guided test mode
Description: Desktop now exposes Stream Safe, Demarrer guide, Etape suivante, and logs guided_test.* so testers can run YouTube, TikTok, Spotify/Deezer, Discord, VLC/game, and OBS checks in order.

Title: Stabilize extension standalone fallback state
Description: When the desktop app is closed and a browser source needs Windows fallback, the popup now stays visually active in observation/fallback mode instead of bouncing active/inactive.

Title: Package tester build for v0.1.0-alpha.1
Description: tools/package-tester.ps1 now regenerates the tester folder, self-contained win-x64 desktop, StreamVolumeGuardHub-Tester-v0.1.0-alpha.1.zip, SHA256 checksum, and LICENSE. Manual clean-folder launch validation is still required before publishing; Windows code signing remains a pro-release prerequisite.

Title: Stabilize V1 after real-source tests
Description: After real-source logs and clean-folder package validation, fix blocking bugs, keep browser limits visible, and confirm docs/UI/logs match the real behavior before any Store work.

Title: Add local diagnostic export
Description: Create an explicit local diagnostic export with sanitized logs, source snapshots, config summary, versions, and no telemetry.

Title: Improve browser-source diagnostics in reports
Description: Make copied reports show calibrationState, captureSignalState, measuredRmsDb, appliedGainDb, and skipped/no-signal reasons clearly.

Title: Prepare OBS Stream Safety Setup
Description: docs/obs-stream-safety-setup.md exists and the desktop Guide OBS action explains Application Audio Capture, Compressor and Limiter. Real OBS meter validation is still required before V1 stable.

Title: Review labels and issue templates before public push
Description: Verify labels.md, issue templates, PR template, project board fields, and README links before pushing.

Title: Prepare Microsoft Store readiness
Description: Prepare a Microsoft Store beta path after V1 stabilization and OBS Stream Safety Setup, without submitting: package format, Store assets, privacy/support links, local bridge notes, extension separation, and validation checklist. Goal: reduce SmartScreen friction without buying an OV/EV certificate immediately.

Title: Add Windows code signing path
Description: Choose a Windows code signing certificate, document signtool usage, and sign the packaged executable later if a pro/stable public release outside Microsoft Store needs it.

Title: Split large desktop UI responsibilities later
Description: Plan a focused split for MainWindow code only after V1 test flow is stable and covered.

Title: Study OBS plugin or VST direction
Description: Compare an OBS plugin, VST, and desktop-only model only after the Hub plus OBS Stream Safety Setup proves the local Windows workflow.
